preconditions: Storage file exists and is readable
test_cases.expected_outcome: Storage file line count increases by exactly 1 after adding a task

preconditions: Storage file exists and contains task with valid ID
test_cases.expected_outcome: Specific line in storage file contains 'status=done' after completing task

preconditions: Storage file exists and contains task with valid ID
test_cases.expected_outcome: Line associated with task ID is no longer present in storage file after deletion
File named 'tasks.txt' exists in current directory with size greater than 0 bytes after init

preconditions: Source code is accessible for static analysis
test_cases.expected_outcome: Static analysis reveals no external imports and no external commands requiring root privileges

preconditions: Valid task name provided via command line arguments
test_cases.expected_outcome: Script returns exit code 0 upon successful task creation

preconditions: Invalid task ID provided via command line arguments
test_cases.expected_outcome: Script prints an error message and exits with code 1
Script exits with code 0 without modifying file contents

preconditions: Storage file exists and contains tasks
test_cases.expected_outcome: Command prints every line from the storage file to stdout, excluding empty lines

preconditions: Storage file is empty or missing
test_cases.expected_outcome: Command prints 'No tasks found' to stdout and exits with code 0

preconditions: Invalid task ID provided via command line arguments
test_cases.expected_outcome: Script prints an error message to stdout

preconditions: Invalid task ID provided via command line arguments
test_cases.expected_outcome: Script prints an error message to stdout
